debug_info.goal:
m n : ℕ
⊢ (m, n) ∈ Imo2002P3.solution ↔ {a | 0 < a ∧ a ^ n + a ^ 2 - 1 ∣ a ^ m + a - 1}.Infinite

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
constructor
  · rintro rfl
    refine Set.Infinite.mono (fun a ha ↦ ?_) Set.infinite_nat
    · exact ⟨Int.coe_nat_pos.mpr ha, by

    have h_root : ∀ z : ℂ, z ^ n + z ^ 2 - 1 = 0 → z ^ m + z - 1 = 0 := by

      have : (Polynomial.aeval z) (X ^ n + X ^ 2 - 1 : ℚ[X]) = 0 := by simp [hz]
      have : (Polynomial.aeval z) (X ^ m + X - 1 : ℚ[X]) = 0 := by
        rw [Polynomial.aeval_eq_zero_of_dvd_aeval_eq_zero h_poly this]
      simpa using this
    have h_real_root : ∃ x : ℝ, 0 < x ∧ x < 1 ∧ x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1 = 0 := by
      let f (x : ℝ) := x ^ n + x ^ 2 - 1
      have hf : Continuous f := by continuity
      have h0 : f 0 = -1 := by simp [f]
      have h1 : f 1 = 1 := by simp [f]
      obtain ⟨x, hx01, hfx⟩ := intermediate_value_interval_zero hf (by linarith) (by linarith)
      exact ⟨x, hx01.1, hx01.2, hfx⟩
    rcases h_real_root with ⟨x, hx0, hx1, hx_root⟩
    have hx_root_m : x ^ m + x - 1 = 0 := by
      have := h_root x (by simp [hx_root])
      simpa using this
    have h_m_n : x ^ n = x ^ m * (1 + x) := by
      linear_combination (1 + x) * hx_root_m - hx_root
    have : n = 3 ∧ m = 5 := by

        rw [h_m_n, mul_add, pow_succ, mul_one]

        have : x ^ n < x ^ m := pow_lt_pow_of_lt_left hx1 hx0 hmn
        linarith
      else if hnm : n < m then
        have : x ^ (m - n) + x ^ (m + 1 - n) = 1 := by

          ring_nf at h_xn
          exact h_xn

          refine ⟨_, ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩

        have : n = 3 ∧ m = 5 := by

        exact this
